title: Python: schc/headers.py removed minimum length checks before parsing
description:
In python/src/lichen/schc/headers.py, explicit length checks were removed from multiple profile matchers:

    # Removed from _CoapUdpProfile.matches():
    # if len(raw) < HEADER_LENGTH + UDP_HEADER_LENGTH + _COAP_FIXED_HEADER:
    #     return False

    # Removed from _RplProfile.matches():
    # if len(raw) < HEADER_LENGTH + _ICMPV6_HEADER + self.base_length:
    #     return False

These were replaced by relying on IPv6Header.from_bytes() to raise an exception. However, this changes the semantics: before, a too-short buffer would return False (no match); now it raises an exception that is caught and returns False.

Location: python/src/lichen/schc/headers.py:110, 200, 322
Risk: If IPv6Header.from_bytes() raises a different exception type, the catch-all may mask bugs.
Fix: Either keep explicit length checks, or narrow the exception handling to only the expected exception type.
